changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE associate_vendors ( id serial, organization_id integer DEFAULT NULL, vendor_id integer DEFAULT NULL, created_by_id integer DEFAULT NULL, updated_by_id integer DEFAULT NULL, created_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), CONSTRAINT pk_associate_vendors PRIMARY KEY (id) , CONSTRAINT fk_associate_vendors_to_organization FOREIGN KEY (organization_id) REFERENCES organizations (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_associate_vendors_to_vendor FOREIGN KEY (vendor_id) REFERENCES organizations (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_associate_vendors_to_created_by FOREIGN KEY (created_by_id) REFERENCES users (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_associate_vendors_to_updated_by FOREIGN KEY (updated_by_id) REFERENCES users (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION ); CREATE INDEX i_associate_vendors_organization ON associate_vendors (organization_id); CREATE INDEX i_associate_vendors_vendor ON associate_vendors (vendor_id); CREATE UNIQUE INDEX ui_associate_vendors_organization__vendor ON associate_vendors (organization_id, vendor_id);
